Ingredients
Water, Milk Protein Concentrate†, Calcium Caseinate†, Contains less than 1% of High Oleic Sunflower Oil or Soybean Oil, Natural and Artificial flavors, Inulin, Cellulose Gel and Cellulose Gum, Salt, Sucralose, Acesulfame Potassium, Carrageenan, Tripotassium Phosphate, Dipotassium Phosphate, Sodium Hexametaphosphate, Vitamin and Mineral Blend (Dl-alpha-tocopheryl Acetate [Vitamin E], Zinc Glycinate Chelate, Ferric Orthophosphate, Vitamin A Palmitate, Niacinamide, Phytonadione [Vitamin K1], Potassium Iodide, Cholecalciferol [Vitamin D3], Copper Gluconate, Calcium D-Pantothenate, Manganese Sulfate, Sodium Selenite, Biotin, Sodium Molybdate, Folic Acid, Thiamine Mononitrate [Vitamin B1], Cyanocobalamin [Vitamin B12], Pyridoxine Hydrochloride [Vitamin B6], Riboflavin [Vitamin B2], Chromium Polynicotinate), Magnesium Phosphate, Sodium Ascorbate. Allergen Information Milk, Soy

About this item

  • Smooth and creamy, rich chocolate flavored shake; Winner of American Masters of Taste Gold Medal for SUPERIOR TASTING ready-to-drink protein beverages.
  • 30g of protein to help curb your hunger, as a mid-day snack or for post workout recovery; includes all essential amino acids.
  • 24 Vitamins and Minerals: Support a healthy immune system as part of a healthy diet and lifestyle (Antioxidants Vitamins C and E plus Zinc), 50 percent daily value of calcium and 30 percent daily value of Vitamin D to help maintain healthy bones.
  • Guilt free indulgence: 1g Sugar, 3-5g Carbs (depending on flavor), 160 Calories and Low Fat; Gluten Free, Keto and Bariatric Friendly, Kosher.
  • We're all in it together when it comes to helping out the environment! That's why we've designed a more sustainable shake bottle. We've lowered our carbon footprint and created a bottle that's easier to recycle by using less material, eliminating the foil seal on the bottle, and switching to PET plastic. Oh, and don't worry- your shakes will still taste just as amazing as always!

Important information

Ingredients

Water, Milk Protein Concentrate†, Calcium Caseinate†, Contains less than 1% of High Oleic Sunflower Oil or Soybean Oil, Natural and Artificial flavors, Inulin, Cellulose Gel and Cellulose Gum, Salt, Sucralose, Acesulfame Potassium, Carrageenan, Tripotassium Phosphate, Dipotassium Phosphate, Sodium Hexametaphosphate, Vitamin and Mineral Blend (Dl-alpha-tocopheryl Acetate [Vitamin E], Zinc Glycinate Chelate, Ferric Orthophosphate, Vitamin A Palmitate, Niacinamide, Phytonadione [Vitamin K1], Potassium Iodide, Cholecalciferol [Vitamin D3], Copper Gluconate, Calcium D-Pantothenate, Manganese Sulfate, Sodium Selenite, Biotin, Sodium Molybdate, Folic Acid, Thiamine Mononitrate [Vitamin B1], Cyanocobalamin [Vitamin B12], Pyridoxine Hydrochloride [Vitamin B6], Riboflavin [Vitamin B2], Chromium Polynicotinate), Magnesium Phosphate, Sodium Ascorbate. CONTAINS MILK AND SOY. † Source of Protein

Directions

Recommended Usage: Shake well, serve cold, and enjoy! Refrigerate after opening. To ensure best quality, store in a cool, dry place.

Legal Disclaimer

Statements regarding dietary supplements have not been evaluated by the FDA and are not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease or health condition.

Disclaimer: While we work to ensure that product information is correct, on occasion manufacturers may alter their ingredient lists. Actual product packaging and materials may contain more and/or different information than that shown on our Web site. We recommend that you do not solely rely on the information presented and that you always read labels, warnings, and directions before using or consuming a product. For additional information about a product, please contact the manufacturer. Content on this site is for reference purposes and is not intended to substitute for advice given by a physician, pharmacist, or other licensed health-care professional. You should not use this information as self-diagnosis or for treating a health problem or disease. Contact your health-care provider immediately if you suspect that you have a medical problem. Information and statements regarding dietary supplements have not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration and are not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease or health condition. Amazon.com assumes no liability for inaccuracies or misstatements about products.

Product Description

Each Premier Protein Shake contains 30g of protein, complete with all the essential amino acids, 1g of sugar, 3–5g of carbs (depending on flavor), 160 calories, 24 vitamins and minerals, and is also low in fat. We use a blend of milk protein concentrate and calcium caseinate to help support your fitness goals. Enjoy a shake as a healthy snack, a breakfast on the go, or as post or pre-workout fuel. They are delicious as is but also highly customizable. Blend with your favorite fruits and vegetables in a smoothie, pour over cereal or oatmeal, or use as a base for proffee (protein coffee) or protein ice cream. Available in 12 core flavors: Bananas & Cream, Cake Batter Delight, Cafe Latte, Caramel, Chocolate, Chocolate Peanut Butter, Cinnamon Roll, Cookie Dough, Cookies & Cream, Peaches & Cream, Strawberries & Cream, and Vanilla. (Seasonal flavors also available for a limited time.)

How customer reviews and ratings work

Customer Reviews, including Product Star Ratings help customers to learn more about the product and decide whether it is the right product for them.

To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyzed reviews to verify trustworthiness.

Learn more how customers reviews work on Amazon
Sponsored

Customers say

Customers find the protein shake delicious and better than other options, appreciating its 30g protein content and vitamins/minerals. The drink is low in sugar and carbs, with only 1 gram of sugar per serving, and customers report it keeps them full for hours and satisfies them until dinner. While the consistency receives mixed reviews, with some finding it thick like pudding and others describing it as chunky, customers consider it good value for money.
AI Generated from the text of customer reviews Generated from the text of customer reviews

778 customers mention taste, 671 positive, 107 negative778 customers mention "Taste"671 positive107 negative
Customers enjoy the taste of the protein shake, finding it delicious and not too sweet.
"Great taste and easy to shake up. Best supplement type drink I've tried. This supplier ships fast in a well protected package. + Cheapest I've found." Read more
"...All the others I’ve tried are horrible and chalky. This was delicious and smooth and reminded me of that chocolate drink I used to get as a kid in..." Read more
"...All in all, this is the best protein shake I've been able to find. Tastes great, packs a ton of protein and doesn't have a lot of calories or fat...." Read more
"These taste great and are great for a quick breakfast. The chocolate tastes the best in my opinion. It has less aftertaste than any of the others...." Read more
322 customers mention quality, 301 positive, 21 negative322 customers mention "Quality"301 positive21 negative
Customers find this protein shake to be of good quality, describing it as their favorite beverage and better than other options like Muscle Milk.
"Great product & only 2 weight watchers points per drink. They are cheaper when purchasing a case of 3 - 4 packs through walmart online though." Read more
"This is a good product lots of protein and not to much sugar. My doctor recommend it for my medical problems it helps a lot. Thanks." Read more
"...All in all, this is the best protein shake I've been able to find. Tastes great, packs a ton of protein and doesn't have a lot of calories or fat...." Read more
"...Chocolate is my favorite and it is very good. Atkins shakes usually bother my stomach so this was a good alternative to Atkins for me...." Read more
208 customers mention protein content, 205 positive, 3 negative208 customers mention "Protein content"205 positive3 negative
Customers appreciate the protein content of this shake, which provides 30 grams of protein and vitamins, with one customer noting it helps them reach half of their daily 60 mg protein goal.
"...Low carb, high chocolate flavor, high protein. It's a total life saver. I mix it with my iced coffee every morning." Read more
"I'm sort of torn on these. The price is good and they taste great. Lots of protein and very low in carbs, so they're good for diabetic diets...." Read more
"...They have great flavors and with 30g of protein you can't go wrong. Easy to grab and go without all the mess mixing your own. Love them!!" Read more
"...With 30 grams of protein this is the best protein drink I’ve found. My personal trainer has also started ordering these once I showed them to her...." Read more
177 customers mention value for money, 135 positive, 42 negative177 customers mention "Value for money"135 positive42 negative
Customers find the protein shake offers good value for money.
"...Good texture, slightly creamy. Great nutritional value. Great price (for some flavors). Cheaper than the competition. Ordered again!" Read more
"Good price!!! I need to take my meds with this, so buying in bulk is the way to go. The chocolate is the best!" Read more
"Good tasting protein shakes at a great value. Not chalky like other brands. Convenient take along carton." Read more
"Pricey but tastes great especially when partially frozen. Paper container may be better than plastic for the environment. Vanilla is good, too." Read more
89 customers mention low sugar, 86 positive, 3 negative89 customers mention "Low sugar"86 positive3 negative
Customers appreciate that the protein shake is low in sugar and carbs, with only 1 gram of sugar and 2 grams of carbs per serving, making it a good high-protein, low-carb option.
"Excellent product with high protein and low sugar and even has fiber. Best taste of any other nutrition shake products." Read more
"Best tasting protein shake out there. Low carb, high chocolate flavor, high protein. It's a total life saver...." Read more
"HIGH IN PROTEIN.....LOW IN SUGAR. VERY GOOD DRINK. ONE PER DAY." Read more
"These are great. There's no sugar. They are very satisfying. The flavor is tasty...." Read more
71 customers mention fullness, 67 positive, 4 negative71 customers mention "Fullness"67 positive4 negative
Customers find the protein shake keeps them full, particularly noting that 30 grams of protein helps maintain satiety, with one customer mentioning it lasts until lunch.
"Best tasting protein shake I have recently tried. Filling and easy to bring with you to supplement your daily intake of protein without an after..." Read more
"...They are very filling and don't have a nasty aftertaste like some other protein drinks. I strongly suggest these to anyone!!" Read more
"...With 30g of protein, they keep me full and energized without feeling heavy...." Read more
"I like the chocolate. It tastes pretty good, and keeps me full. Bottom line is it is a protein shake and not candy. It is worth every penny." Read more
67 customers mention digestibility, 56 positive, 11 negative67 customers mention "Digestibility"56 positive11 negative
Customers find the protein shake easy to digest, with several noting it keeps them satisfied for hours until dinner. One customer mentions it's perfect for busy mornings, while another describes it as a great post-workout pick-me-up.
"...You don't forget it's a protein drink. That said, it's satisfying and very high in protein, and if it was too delicious you'd be tempted to drink..." Read more
"Great way to start the day - even put in a drop of peppermint oil to change it up...." Read more
"...recommend this protein product for those on the run as a satisfying meal replacement. In a perfect world it would be organic, GMO free and..." Read more
"Great little snack throughout the day that satisfies the sweet tooth. Good ratio of macros too if you're watching those...." Read more
64 customers mention consistency, 15 positive, 49 negative64 customers mention "Consistency"15 positive49 negative
Customers find the consistency of the protein shake negative, describing it as chunky and thick like pudding.
"Didn't think flavor was a good quality chocolate. Tasted weak and watery." Read more
"Received expired product. Disgusting, bad taste and clumpy. Gross. Received on September 12, product already expired when shipped." Read more
"...I like truffles for my chocolate likeness reference. One or two came clumpy." Read more
"...It's not chalky but it's thick (not watery), it goes down smooth, it packs a ton of protein (30g) and only has 160 calories...." Read more

    5 out of 5 stars
    Delicious, Nutritious, and Full of Proteins and 24 Vitamins & Minerals !!
    Reviewed in the United States on May 3, 2026
    Flavor Name: ChocolateSize: 11 Fl Oz (Pack of 12)
    Verified Purchase
    Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
    Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.

    The Premier Protein Shakes are offered in Chocolate and several other flavors, all very good and tasty in my humble opinion ! If you are looking for a drink with a lot of protein - 30 Grams Protein and numerous other vitamins and minerals all with NO ADDED SUGAR, try these drinks. You will be glad you did... it is a great way to begin your day or even drink at mid-day for a healthy pick-me-up. They are so easy to use in this box style container and also come in bottles. The chocolate is so delicious, try it, then try all the other flavors, like Cafe Latte, Caramel, Vanilla, Strawberry. You will be delighted with getting your nutrition in a really chocolatey drink.

    Flavor Name: ChocolateSize: 11 Fl Oz (Pack of 12)

    This is better than expected - filling - chocolate-milkish taste - lots of protein - only o few calories - good for

    times you want to eat less but still have energy - It is a good product to have on hand - it is filling - this

  • Daniel
    5 out of 5 stars
    Great-Tasting Protein Shake With Fresh Product Dates and Excellent Nutrition
    Reviewed in the United States on May 28, 2026
    Flavor Name: ChocolateSize: 11 Fl Oz (Pack of 12)
    Verified Purchase
    Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
    Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.

    I picked up this Premier Protein chocolate shake 12-pack mainly as a convenient daily protein option, and overall the quality has been excellent.

    The chocolate flavor tastes very good without being overly sweet, and the texture is smooth compared to many protein drinks that can feel chalky or heavy. The 30 grams of protein also make it very practical for quick meals, post-workout use, or busy days when preparing food is not convenient.

    One thing I appreciated is that the product arrived with fresh expiration dates, which is important when buying protein drinks in bulk. The packaging was also in good condition, and the bottles were easy to store and carry.

    The nutritional balance is another strong point, especially with the added vitamins and minerals included without extra added sugar. Compared to many other ready-to-drink protein shakes, this one feels lighter while still being filling and satisfying.

    In terms of value for the money, it feels like a very good purchase considering the quality, nutrition content, convenience, and freshness.

    Overall, a high-quality protein shake with excellent taste, fresh product dates, strong nutritional value, and very good everyday convenience. It can also be mixed with other flavors.

    Read moreRead less

    These drinks are very convenient. I can take them with me if I’m running behind or I can just drink them here at home. The taste isn’t bad, I can handle it, but it’s not like drinking a glass of chocolate milk. The texture is quite smooth as it is already mixed up for you and it is always the same. I have never had a batch that is not been the same taste. I like that I can drink a small bit of chocolate and gain 30 g of protein.

    Drink one every day over ice! Great taste!
    Reviewed in the United States on March 22, 2026
    Flavor Name: ChocolateSize: 11 Fl Oz (Pack of 12)
    Verified Purchase
    Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
    Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.

    I’ve been getting Premier Protein Shake on auto delivery for a while now, and it’s one of the best decisions I’ve made for convenience and consistency. Each shake packs 30g of protein with only 1g of sugar, which makes it perfect for busy mornings or a quick post-workout boost without the guilt. ￼

    The auto delivery is a game changer—no more running out or last-minute store trips. It just shows up right when I need it, and I can easily adjust or skip deliveries if needed. 📦

    Taste-wise, the shakes are smooth and actually enjoyable (not chalky like some others). I’ve tried a few flavors and haven’t been disappointed yet.

    If you’re looking for a reliable, grab-and-go protein option with zero hassle, this subscription is 100% worth it! 💪

Product Summary: Premier Protein Shake, Chocolate, 30g Protein, No Added Sugar, 24 Vitamins & Minerals to Support Immune Health, 11 fl oz, 12 Pack

From Premier Protein

4.8 out of 5 stars, 7,513 ratings

Customer reviews

10K+ bought in past week

Price

One-time purchase: $25.01 ( $0.19 / fluid ounce) 6% Savings

List Price: $26.74

Subscribe & Save price (No fees, Cancel anytime): $23.76 ( $0.18 / fluid ounce) 11% Savings

List Price: $26.74

Additional savings available through Subscribe & Save (No fees, Cancel anytime)

Purchasing options

Other sellers

Other sellers

About this Item

  • Smooth and creamy, rich chocolate flavored shake; Winner of American Masters of Taste Gold Medal for SUPERIOR TASTING ready-to-drink protein beverages.
  • 30g of protein to help curb your hunger, as a mid-day snack or for post workout recovery; includes all essential amino acids.
  • 24 Vitamins and Minerals: Support a healthy immune system as part of a healthy diet and lifestyle (Antioxidants Vitamins C and E plus Zinc), 50 percent daily value of calcium and 30 percent daily value of Vitamin D to help maintain healthy bones.
  • Guilt free indulgence: 1g Sugar, 3-5g Carbs (depending on flavor), 160 Calories and Low Fat; Gluten Free, Keto and Bariatric Friendly, Kosher.
  • We're all in it together when it comes to helping out the environment! That's why we've designed a more sustainable shake bottle. We've lowered our carbon footprint and created a bottle that's easier to recycle by using less material, eliminating the foil seal on the bottle, and switching to PET plastic. Oh, and don't worry- your shakes will still taste just as amazing as always!

Product Description

Each Premier Protein Shake contains 30g of protein, complete with all the essential amino acids, 1g of sugar, 3–5g of carbs (depending on flavor), 160 calories, 24 vitamins and minerals, and is also low in fat. We use a blend of milk protein concentrate and calcium caseinate to help support your fitness goals. Enjoy a shake as a healthy snack, a breakfast on the go, or as post or pre-workout fuel. They are delicious as is but also highly customizable. Blend with your favorite fruits and vegetables in a smoothie, pour over cereal or oatmeal, or use as a base for proffee (protein coffee) or protein ice cream. Available in 12 core flavors: Bananas & Cream, Cake Batter Delight, Cafe Latte, Caramel, Chocolate, Chocolate Peanut Butter, Cinnamon Roll, Cookie Dough, Cookies & Cream, Peaches & Cream, Strawberries & Cream, and Vanilla. (Seasonal flavors also available for a limited time.)

Options Available

Flavor Name

  • Banana
  • Cafe Latte
  • Cake Batter
  • Caramel
  • Chocolate
  • Chocolate Peanut Butter
  • Cinnamon Roll
  • Cookie Dough
  • Cookies & Cream
  • Peach
  • Strawberries & Cream
  • Vanilla

Size

  • 11 Fl Oz (Pack of 4)
  • 11 Fl Oz (Pack of 12)
  • 11 Fl Oz (Pack of 15)
  • 11 Fl Oz (Pack of 24)
Browse all available options

Important Information

Ingredients

Water, Milk Protein Concentrate†, Calcium Caseinate†, Contains less than 1% of High Oleic Sunflower Oil or Soybean Oil, Natural and Artificial flavors, Inulin, Cellulose Gel and Cellulose Gum, Salt, Sucralose, Acesulfame Potassium, Carrageenan, Tripotassium Phosphate, Dipotassium Phosphate, Sodium Hexametaphosphate, Vitamin and Mineral Blend (Dl-alpha-tocopheryl Acetate [Vitamin E], Zinc Glycinate Chelate, Ferric Orthophosphate, Vitamin A Palmitate, Niacinamide, Phytonadione [Vitamin K1], Potassium Iodide, Cholecalciferol [Vitamin D3], Copper Gluconate, Calcium D-Pantothenate, Manganese Sulfate, Sodium Selenite, Biotin, Sodium Molybdate, Folic Acid, Thiamine Mononitrate [Vitamin B1], Cyanocobalamin [Vitamin B12], Pyridoxine Hydrochloride [Vitamin B6], Riboflavin [Vitamin B2], Chromium Polynicotinate), Magnesium Phosphate, Sodium Ascorbate. CONTAINS MILK AND SOY. † Source of Protein

Directions

Recommended Usage: Shake well, serve cold, and enjoy! Refrigerate after opening. To ensure best quality, store in a cool, dry place.

Legal Disclaimer

Statements regarding dietary supplements have not been evaluated by the FDA and are not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease or health condition.
